query:
ALTER TABLE metasploit_servers 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sshTunnelEnabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sshUser VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT 'root',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS msfSshKeyPath TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS msfTunnelStatus ENUM('connected','connecting','disconnected','reconnecting','error') DEFAULT 'disconnected',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS tunnelLocalPort INT;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute ALTER TABLE metasploit_servers 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sshTunnelEnabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sshUser VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT 'root',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS msfSshKeyPath TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS msfTunnelStatus ENUM('connected','connecting','disconnected','reconnecting','error') DEFAULT 'disconnected',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS tunnelLocalPort INT;
